scripts.upload: npm run build && node -e "const cp=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let prefix='';try{prefix=cp.execSync('npm prefix -g',{stdio:['ignore','pipe','ignore']}).toString().trim()}catch(e){};const candidates=[path.join(prefix,'bin','opdev'),path.join(prefix,'bin','opdev.cmd'),path.join(prefix,'node_modules','.bin','opdev'),path.join(prefix,'node_modules','.bin','opdev.cmd'),path.join(prefix,'lib','node_modules','.bin','opdev'),path.join(prefix,'lib','node_modules','.bin','opdev.cmd')];const opdev=candidates.find(p=>p&&fs.existsSync(p));if(!opdev){console.error('opdev not found in global npm prefix. Please run: npm i -g @lark-opdev/cli');process.exit(1);}const r=cp.spawnSync(opdev,['upload','./dist'],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status==null?1:r.status);"
